user.title: Configure DHL API
user.description: Enter your API key from the DHL Developer Portal (developer.dhl.com → Shipment Tracking – Unified).

data_description.api_key: Found at developer.dhl.com → Your App → Authorization
data_description.sandbox: Enable to use test tracking numbers without consuming real API calls

error.invalid_api_key: Invalid API key – please check on developer.dhl.com
error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to DHL API – check your internet connection
error.unknown: Unknown error – check the logs for details

abort.already_configured: DHL Shipment Tracking is already configured

add_tracking.title: Add shipment
add_tracking.description: Enter a DHL tracking number. The sensor will be created automatically after saving.

data_description.tracking_number: Full DHL tracking number without spaces
data_description.label: Human-readable label, e.g. 'Amazon May' (used as sensor name)

manage_trackings.title: Manage shipments
manage_trackings.description: Select shipments to remove. The sensor entities will be deleted.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: The update interval controls how often the DHL API is queried. With 250 calls/day and 1 shipment: at least every 345 seconds. Default 1800 s (30 min) is optimal for up to 5 shipments.

error.invalid_tracking_number: Tracking number is too short or invalid
error.tracking_already_added: This tracking number is already being tracked
error.no_trackings: No shipments saved – add a shipment first
